name: Can my employer fire me for filing occupational illness claim in Boise?

mainEntity.name: Can my employer fire me for filing occupational illness claim in Boise?

acceptedAnswer.text: No, retaliation illegal; seek Labor Commission help.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Utah prohibits retaliation for workers’ comp claims; illegal discharge leads to reinstatement, back pay.[1] Key factors: (1) Protected activity; (2) Causal link to firing; (3) File complaint with Labor Commission.[1] Document communications, timing; consult attorney immediately.[1] Protections ensure safe filing.

description: No, retaliation illegal; seek Labor Commission help.[1]
